<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Divinefavour Udechukwu — Digital Content Architect</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Mono:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --black: #0a090f;
    --off-black: #0f0d16;
    --surface: #13101d;
    --surface-2: #1a1626;
    --border: rgba(180,160,220,0.09);
    --lav: #b89fd8;
    --lav-bright: #cdb8f0;
    --lav-deep: #9b82c8;
    --lav-glow: rgba(184,159,216,0.18);
    --lav-subtle: rgba(184,159,216,0.07);
    --white: #f5f2fc;
    --white-dim: rgba(245,242,252,0.55);
    --white-mute: rgba(245,242,252,0.25);
    --text-body: #c8c0dc;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    cursor: none;
  }

  /* CURSOR */
  .cursor {
    position: fixed; width: 7px; height: 7px;
    background: var(--lav-bright); border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
    transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
  }
  .cursor-ring {
    position: fixed; width: 34px; height: 34px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,159,216,0.45); border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 9998;
    transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
    transition: all 0.18s ease;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 28px 64px;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
  }
  nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(10,9,15,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(24px);
    padding: 18px 64px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-weight: 300; font-size: 17px; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--white); text-decoration: none;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--lav-bright); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 40px; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--lav-bright); }
  .nav-cta {
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--black); background: var(--lav);
    padding: 11px 26px; text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--lav-bright); transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* HERO */
  #hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: flex-end; padding: 0 64px 88px;
    overflow: hidden; position: relative;
  }
  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 65% at 75% 35%, rgba(184,159,216,0.1) 0%, transparent 65%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 35% 45% at 15% 75%, rgba(155,130,200,0.07) 0%, transparent 55%),
      var(--black);
  }
  .hero-grain {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.04;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
    background-size: 256px; pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-top-line {
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 64px; right: 64px; height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--lav), transparent);
    opacity: 0.35;
  }
  .hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .hero-tag {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lav); margin-bottom: 36px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.3s forwards;
  }
  .hero-tag::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 28px; height: 1px; background: var(--lav);
  }
  .hero-h1 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-weight: 300; font-size: clamp(60px, 9vw, 136px);
    line-height: 0.91; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--white);
    margin-bottom: 34px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s ease 0.5s forwards;
  }
  .hero-h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--lav-bright); }
  .hero-sub {
    max-width: 500px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--white-dim); margin-bottom: 52px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.7s forwards;
  }
  .hero-actions {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.9s forwards;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--black); background: var(--lav);
    padding: 15px 36px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--lav-bright); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-ghost {
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-dim); text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--lav-bright); }
  .btn-ghost::after { content: '→'; transition: transform 0.2s; }
  .btn-ghost:hover::after { transform: translateX(4px); }
  .hero-stats {
    position: absolute; bottom: 88px; left: 64px;
    display: flex; gap: 52px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 0.9s ease 1.1s forwards;
  }
  .stat-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 38px; font-weight: 300; color: var(--white); line-height: 1;
  }
  .stat-num span { color: var(--lav); font-size: 24px; }
  .stat-label {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white-mute);
  }
  .hero-scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 88px; right: 64px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease 1.4s forwards;
  }
  .hero-scroll span {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-mute); writing-mode: vertical-rl;
  }
  .scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 56px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--lav), transparent);
    animation: pulse 2.2s ease infinite;
  }

  /* MARQUEE */
  .marquee-wrap {
    overflow: hidden;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 16px 0; background: var(--off-black);
  }
  .marquee-track {
    display: flex; animation: marquee 32s linear infinite; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .marquee-item {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; padding-right: 56px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white-mute);
  }
  .m-dot {
    width: 4px; height: 4px; background: var(--lav); border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* LAYOUT */
  .section-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 140px 64px; }
  .section-tag {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lav); margin-bottom: 52px;
  }
  .section-tag::before {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 22px; height: 1px; background: var(--lav);
  }
  .section-h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300;
    font-size: clamp(44px, 5.5vw, 82px); line-height: 1.04; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    color: var(--white);
  }
  .section-h2 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--lav-bright); }

  /* ABOUT */
  #about { background: var(--off-black); }
  .about-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 96px; align-items: start;
  }
  .about-left .section-h2 { margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .about-body { font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.88; color: var(--text-body); margin-bottom: 22px; }
  .about-body strong { color: var(--white); font-weight: 600; }
  .about-divider { width: 56px; height: 1px; background: var(--lav); margin: 36px 0; }
  .about-quote {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 21px;
    font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.55; border-left: 2px solid var(--lav); padding-left: 22px;
  }
  .about-right { padding-top: 72px; }
  .about-card {
    background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 36px; margin-bottom: 2px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
  }
  .about-card:hover { border-color: rgba(184,159,216,0.28); background: var(--surface-2); }
  .about-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
    width: 3px; height: 0; background: var(--lav); transition: height 0.4s ease;
  }
  .about-card:hover::before { height: 100%; }
  .card-num {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: var(--lav); margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .card-title { font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 9px; }
  .card-body { font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.78; color: var(--white-mute); }

  /* PROBLEM */
  #problem { background: var(--black); }
  .problem-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 2px; margin-top: 80px; }
  .problem-card {
    background: var(--surface); padding: 48px 36px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .problem-card:hover { background: var(--surface-2); }
  .problem-icon { font-size: 26px; margin-bottom: 24px; opacity: 0.75; }
  .problem-card h3 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .problem-card p { font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.82; color: var(--white-mute); }
  .pain-tag {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 22px;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #cc7070; border: 1px solid rgba(204,112,112,0.25); padding: 4px 11px;
  }

  /* SOLUTION */
  #solution { background: var(--off-black); }
  .solution-layout {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.1fr; gap: 96px; align-items: center;
  }
  .solution-visual { position: relative; height: 500px; }
  .sol-main {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .sol-glow {
    width: 260px; height: 260px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(184,159,216,0.14) 0%, transparent 70%);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative;
  }
  .sol-ring {
    position: absolute; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid rgba(184,159,216,0.14);
    animation: rotate 22s linear infinite;
  }
  .sol-ring-1 { width: 190px; height: 190px; }
  .sol-ring-2 { width: 270px; height: 270px; animation-direction:reverse; animation-duration:32s; }
  .sol-ring-3 { width: 360px; height: 360px; animation-duration:50s; }
  .sol-center {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 13px;
    font-style: italic; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--lav);
    text-align: center; z-index: 1; line-height: 1.65;
  }
  .sol-badge {
    position: absolute; background: var(--lav); color: var(--black);
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 7px 14px; font-weight: 600;
  }
  .sol-badge-tl { top: 22px; left: 22px; }
  .sol-badge-br { bottom: 22px; right: 22px; }
  .solution-right .section-h2 { margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .solution-body { font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--text-body); margin-bottom: 44px; }
  .pills { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
  .pill {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    padding: 17px 22px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    font-size: 13px; color: var(--white); transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
  }
  .pill:hover { border-color: rgba(184,159,216,0.3); background: var(--surface-2); }
  .pill-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: var(--lav); border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* SERVICES */
  #services { background: var(--black); }
  .services-header {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
    margin-bottom: 72px; gap: 60px;
  }
  .services-header-right {
    max-width: 340px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.82;
    color: var(--text-body); padding-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 2px; }
  .service-card {
    background: var(--surface); padding: 52px 36px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    border-top: 2px solid transparent;
    transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
  }
  .service-card:hover { background: var(--surface-2); border-color: var(--lav); }
  .service-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 60px; font-weight: 300;
    color: rgba(184,159,216,0.07); position: absolute; top: 28px; right: 28px;
    line-height: 1; transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .service-card:hover .service-num { color: rgba(184,159,216,0.14); }
  .service-icon { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .service-card h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .service-card p { font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--white-mute); margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .service-features { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
  .service-features li {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 9.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--text-body);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  }
  .service-features li::before { content:''; width:13px; height:1px; background:var(--lav); flex-shrink:0; }

  /* WORK - CASE STUDIES */
  #work { background: var(--off-black); }
  .work-header {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
    margin-bottom: 72px;
  }

  /* Case card structure */
  .case-card {
    background: var(--surface); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .case-card:hover { border-color: rgba(184,159,216,0.22); }
  .case-visual {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    display: grid;
  }
  .case-img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    display: block;
  }
  .case-card:hover .case-img { transform: scale(1.03); }
  .case-type-badge {
    position: absolute; top: 18px; left: 18px; z-index: 3;
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--lav-bright); border: 1px solid rgba(184,159,216,0.35);
    padding: 5px 12px; background: rgba(10,9,15,0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  }
  .case-body { padding: 32px 36px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .case-meta { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-bottom:13px; }
  .case-client {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--lav);
  }
  .case-year { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px; color: var(--white-mute); }
  .case-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.3; }
  .case-desc { font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.78; color: var(--white-mute); margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .case-tags { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:7px; }
  .tag {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-body); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 4px 11px;
  }

  /* Case study layouts */
  .case-featured {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 0;
  }
  .case-featured .case-visual { height: 520px; }
  .case-featured-imgs {
    display: grid; grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2px;
  }
  .case-featured-imgs .case-img { height: 100%; }
  .case-featured .case-body {
    padding: 48px 44px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
    border-top: none; border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .case-grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2px; }
  .case-grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 2px; }
  .case-inner-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2px; height: 100%;
  }
  .case-inner-grid .case-img { height: 260px; }

  /* Inner case image heights */
  .case-grid-2 .case-visual { height: 360px; }
  .case-grid-3 .case-visual { height: 300px; }

  /* PROCESS */
  #process { background: var(--black); }
  .process-header { margin-bottom: 88px; max-width: 580px; }
  .process-header .section-h2 { margin-bottom: 22px; }
  .process-header p { font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.82; color: var(--text-body); }
  .process-steps {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr);
    gap: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .process-step {
    padding: 48px 36px; position: relative;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .process-step:last-child { border-right: none; }
  .process-step:hover { background: var(--surface); }
  .step-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 68px;
    font-weight: 300; color: rgba(184,159,216,0.07);
    line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 28px; transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .process-step:hover .step-num { color: rgba(184,159,216,0.15); }
  .step-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .step-body { font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.82; color: var(--white-mute); }
  .step-dot {
    position: absolute; top: 48px; right: -1px;
    width: 7px; height: 7px; background: var(--lav);
    border-radius: 50%; z-index: 2; transform: translateX(50%);
  }
  .process-step:last-child .step-dot { display: none; }

  /* CREDIBILITY */
  #credibility { background: var(--off-black); }
  .cred-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 96px; align-items: start; }
  .cred-left .section-h2 { margin-bottom: 44px; }
  .testimonial-block {
    padding: 44px; background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-left: 2px solid var(--lav);
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .test-text {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 17.5px;
    font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; color: var(--white);
    line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .test-name { font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white); }
  .test-role { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--lav); margin-top: 4px; }
  .cred-right { padding-top: 52px; }
  .cred-stat-block {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 36px 0;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 20px;
  }
  .cred-stat-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 50px;
    font-weight: 300; color: var(--white); line-height: 1;
  }
  .cred-stat-num span { color: var(--lav); }
  .cred-stat-title { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .cred-stat-desc { font-size: 11.5px; line-height: 1.72; color: var(--white-mute); }
  .platform-row { display: flex; gap: 2px; margin-top: 52px; }
  .platform-badge {
    flex: 1; padding: 18px 14px; background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .platform-badge:hover { border-color: rgba(184,159,216,0.3); }
  .platform-badge span:first-child { font-size: 16px; }
  .platform-badge span:last-child {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 7.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--white-mute); text-align: center;
  }

  /* CTA */
  #contact { background: var(--black); overflow: hidden; }
  .cta-inner {
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 160px 64px;
    position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center;
  }
  .cta-bg-text {
    position: absolute; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: clamp(110px, 18vw, 250px); font-weight: 300; font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(184,159,216,0.03); white-space: nowrap;
    pointer-events: none; user-select: none;
    top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  }
  .cta-tag { margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .cta-h2 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300;
    font-size: clamp(52px, 7vw, 100px); line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 24px; position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }
  .cta-h2 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--lav-bright); }
  .cta-sub {
    max-width: 460px; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--text-body);
    margin-bottom: 52px; position: relative; z-index: 2;
  }
  .cta-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 30px; position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .cta-email {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: 0.16em;
    color: var(--white-dim); text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 3px;
    transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .cta-email:hover { color: var(--lav-bright); border-color: var(--lav); }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    background: var(--off-black); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 36px 64px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: var(--white-dim);
  }
  .footer-logo span { color: var(--lav); }
  .footer-links { display: flex; gap: 30px; list-style: none; }
  .footer-links a {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--white-mute); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover { color: var(--lav); }
  .footer-copy {
    font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 8.5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: var(--white-mute);
  }

  /* REVEAL */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.9s ease, transform 0.9s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .reveal-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }
  .reveal-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; }
  .reveal-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; }
  .reveal-delay-4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; }

  /* KEYFRAMES */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0; } to { opacity:1; } }
  @keyframes marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100% { opacity:.3; } 50% { opacity:1; } }
  @keyframes rotate { from { transform:rotate(0deg); } to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }

  /* SCROLLBAR */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 3px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--black); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--lav); border-radius: 2px; }

  /* MOBILE */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 22px 24px; }
    nav.scrolled { padding: 16px 24px; }
    .nav-links, .nav-cta { display: none; }
    #hero { padding: 0 24px 100px; }
    .hero-stats, .hero-scroll { display: none; }
    .section-inner { padding: 88px 24px; }
    .about-grid, .solution-layout, .cred-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 52px; }
    .about-right { padding-top: 0; }
    .problem-grid, .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .services-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
    .work-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 20px; }
    .case-featured { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .case-featured .case-body { border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
    .case-grid-2, .case-grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .process-steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 22px; text-align: center; }
    .cta-actions { flex-direction: column; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>
<div class="cursor-ring" id="cursorRing"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Divine<span>favour</span></a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#work">Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#process">Process</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Start a Project</a>
</nav>

<!-- ═══ HERO ═══ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grain"></div>
  <div class="hero-top-line"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-tag">Digital Content Architect &amp; Visual Strategist</div>
    <h1 class="hero-h1">
      Where Brands<br>
      Find Their<br>
      <em>Visual Identity</em>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      I don't make content. I build visual infrastructure — cinematic brand assets that replace expensive production with precision AI storytelling.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="#work" class="btn-primary">View Selected Work</a>
      <a href="#about" class="btn-ghost">What I Do</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">50<span>+</span></div>
      <div class="stat-label">Brand Projects</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">4</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Brand Categories</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
      <div class="stat-num">0</div>
      <div class="stat-label">Photoshoots Needed</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <span>Scroll</span>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-wrap">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>AI Visual Production</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Cinematic Brand Storytelling</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>High-Realism Product Visuals</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Social Media Visual Systems</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Beauty &amp; Lifestyle Campaigns</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Fashion Brand Identity</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>AI Visual Production</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Cinematic Brand Storytelling</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>High-Realism Product Visuals</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Social Media Visual Systems</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Beauty &amp; Lifestyle Campaigns</div>
    <div class="marquee-item"><div class="m-dot"></div>Fashion Brand Identity</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══ ABOUT ═══ -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-left reveal">
        <div class="section-tag">About</div>
        <h2 class="section-h2">The Architect<br>Behind the<br><em>Aesthetic</em></h2>
        <div class="about-divider"></div>
        <p class="about-body">
          I'm <strong>Divinefavour Udechukwu</strong> — a Digital Content Architect and Visual Strategist building cinematic brand worlds without a single camera.
        </p>
        <p class="about-body">
          My work sits at the intersection of <strong>AI technology, brand strategy, and visual storytelling</strong>. I don't freelance on tasks — I architect visual systems that give brands a coherent, premium identity across every touchpoint.
        </p>
        <blockquote class="about-quote">
          "Most brands settle for content that fills space. I build content that earns attention."
        </blockquote>
      </div>
      <div class="about-right reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="card-num">01 / ROLE</div>
          <div class="card-title">Digital Content Architect</div>
          <div class="card-body">I don't just produce visuals — I design the entire visual language of a brand. From concept strategy through to production delivery, I own the full pipeline.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="card-num">02 / METHOD</div>
          <div class="card-title">AI-Driven Cinematic Production</div>
          <div class="card-body">Using high-realism AI models, I eliminate the cost and friction of traditional photoshoots while producing assets at studio quality — or above it.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="about-card">
          <div class="card-num">03 / RESULT</div>
          <div class="card-title">Brand-Level Visual Authority</div>
          <div class="card-body">Brands leave our collaboration with cohesive, conversion-ready visual infrastructure — not just individual pieces of content.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ PROBLEM ═══ -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">The Production Gap</div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">What's Costing Brands<br><em>More</em> Than They Know</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-card reveal">
        <div class="problem-icon">💸</div>
        <h3>Traditional Shoots Are Expensive — and Slow</h3>
        <p>Studio rentals, photographers, models, post-production. A single campaign shoot can run $5,000–$50,000+ before one image is live.</p>
        <span class="pain-tag">High Cost</span>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="problem-icon">📦</div>
        <h3>Production Logistics Are a Full-Time Job</h3>
        <p>Booking, briefing, coordinating, approving. Most brands spend more time managing production than they do building product.</p>
        <span class="pain-tag">Lost Time</span>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="problem-icon">📉</div>
        <h3>Generic Visuals Destroy Premium Positioning</h3>
        <p>When brands default to cheap stock or rushed content, they signal low value — even if the product itself is premium.</p>
        <span class="pain-tag">Brand Damage</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ SOLUTION ═══ -->
<section id="solution">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="solution-layout">
      <div class="solution-visual reveal">
        <div class="sol-main">
          <div class="sol-glow">
            <div class="sol-ring sol-ring-1"></div>
            <div class="sol-ring sol-ring-2"></div>
            <div class="sol-ring sol-ring-3"></div>
            <div class="sol-center">Cinematic<br>without<br>a camera</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sol-badge sol-badge-tl">AI-Powered</div>
        <div class="sol-badge sol-badge-br">Studio Quality</div>
      </div>
      <div class="solution-right reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="section-tag">The Solution</div>
        <h2 class="section-h2">Cinematic<br>Production.<br><em>No Set Required.</em></h2>
        <p class="solution-body">
          I replace the entire traditional production pipeline with high-realism AI storytelling — delivering brand assets that look like they cost ten times more, in a fraction of the time.
        </p>
        <div class="pills">
          <div class="pill"><div class="pill-dot"></div>High-realism AI product visuals at scale</div>
          <div class="pill"><div class="pill-dot"></div>Zero logistics — no sets, no crews, no delays</div>
          <div class="pill"><div class="pill-dot"></div>Full creative direction, not just execution</div>
          <div class="pill"><div class="pill-dot"></div>Consistent visual language across every asset</div>
          <div class="pill"><div class="pill-dot"></div>Faster turnaround than any traditional studio</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ SERVICES ═══ -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="services-header reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="section-tag">Services</div>
        <h2 class="section-h2">What I<br>Build For<br><em>Brands</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="services-header-right">
        Every engagement is a visual partnership. I don't deliver files — I deliver brand assets engineered to convert, retain attention, and communicate authority at a glance.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card reveal">
        <div class="service-num">01</div>
        <div class="service-icon">✦</div>
        <h3>AI Product Visuals</h3>
        <p>High-realism product imagery created entirely through AI — indistinguishable from studio photography, without the budget or timeline.</p>
        <ul class="service-features">
          <li>Product hero shots</li>
          <li>E-commerce visual packages</li>
          <li>Campaign imagery</li>
          <li>Multi-variant visual systems</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="service-num">02</div>
        <div class="service-icon">◈</div>
        <h3>Cinematic Brand Storytelling</h3>
        <p>Full visual narratives that communicate your brand's world — from mood and ethos to product detail. Made for brands that want to be remembered.</p>
        <ul class="service-features">
          <li>Brand world development</li>
          <li>Campaign concepting &amp; execution</li>
          <li>Visual narrative design</li>
          <li>Brand identity expression</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="service-num">03</div>
        <div class="service-icon">⬡</div>
        <h3>Social Media Visual Systems</h3>
        <p>Designed-for-scroll content architectures that maintain premium brand presence across platforms — consistently, at volume.</p>
        <ul class="service-features">
          <li>Platform visual strategy</li>
          <li>Content calendar infrastructure</li>
          <li>Feed aesthetic direction</li>
          <li>Monthly asset production</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ WORK / CASE STUDIES ═══ -->
<section id="work">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="work-header reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="section-tag">Selected Work</div>
        <h2 class="section-h2">Case <em>Studies</em></h2>
      </div>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost" style="padding-bottom:12px;">Start a project</a>
    </div>

    <!-- CASE 1: DANBAOLY LUXURY BAG — Featured wide -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:2px;">
      <div class="case-card case-featured reveal">
        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.15fr 1fr; gap:0;">
          <div style="position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:grid; grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; height:520px;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Danbaoly bag hero shot" style="height:100%;">
            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Danbaoly bag closeup" style="height:100%;">
              <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Danbaoly bag lifestyle" style="height:100%;">
            </div>
            <div class="case-type-badge">Fashion · Luxury</div>
          </div>
          <div class="case-body" style="padding:52px 48px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; border-top:none; border-left:1px solid var(--border);">
            <div class="case-meta">
              <span class="case-client">Danbaoly — Luxury Accessories</span>
              <span class="case-year">2024</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="case-title">Premium Fashion Campaign — Luxury Bag Visual Identity</h3>
            <p class="case-desc">Danbaoly needed visuals that matched the quality of their product — a premium leather handbag with gold hardware that deserved more than a basic product shot. I created a complete campaign system: dark studio hero shots, macro texture details, and lifestyle model imagery — all AI-generated, zero physical production.</p>
            <p class="case-desc" style="font-size:11.5px; color:var(--lav); font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:0.08em;">Result: Cohesive visual identity across 6 campaign assets. Elevated brand perception from mid-market to luxury positioning.</p>
            <div class="case-tags" style="margin-top:8px;">
              <span class="tag">Fashion</span>
              <span class="tag">Luxury Bags</span>
              <span class="tag">Model Lifestyle</span>
              <span class="tag">Brand Elevation</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CASE 2: DOVE BEAUTY — Featured wide reversed -->
    <div style="margin-bottom:2px;">
      <div class="case-card reveal">
        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1.15fr; gap:0;">
          <div class="case-body" style="padding:52px 48px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; border-top:none; border-right:1px solid var(--border);">
            <div class="case-meta">
              <span class="case-client">Dove — Beauty &amp; Personal Care</span>
              <span class="case-year">2024</span>
            </div>
            <h3 class="case-title">Dove Body Scrub — Full Campaign Visual System</h3>
            <p class="case-desc">Dove needed a campaign that felt warm, natural, and premium — far from typical FMCG product photography. I built a complete visual world: a flat-lay hero with natural ingredients, a window-light product tableau, an in-use lifestyle scene, and a macro texture close-up that communicates sensory quality at a glance.</p>
            <p class="case-desc" style="font-size:11.5px; color:var(--lav); font-family:'DM Mono',monospace; letter-spacing:0.08em;">Result: 4-asset campaign suite ready for social, e-commerce, and print. Warm, organic visual tone aligned with Dove's brand ethos.</p>
            <div class="case-tags" style="margin-top:8px;">
              <span class="tag">Beauty</span>
              <span class="tag">FMCG</span>
              <span class="tag">Lifestyle</span>
              <span class="tag">Product Campaign</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr; gap:2px; height:520px;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Dove body scrub with window light" style="height:100%;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Dove lifestyle in use" style="height:100%;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Dove flat lay" style="height:100%;">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Dove texture close up" style="height:100%;">
            <div class="case-type-badge">Beauty · FMCG</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CASE 3: SNEAKERS + WELLNESS — side by side -->
    <div class="case-grid-2" style="margin-bottom:2px;">
      <div class="case-card reveal">
        <div class="case-visual" style="height:380px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Sneaker rain close" style="height:380px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Sneaker rain street" style="height:380px;">
          <div class="case-type-badge">Footwear · Lifestyle</div>
        </div>
        <div class="case-body">
          <div class="case-meta">
            <span class="case-client">Athletic Footwear Brand</span>
            <span class="case-year">2024</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="case-title">All-Conditions Sneaker Campaign — Rain Cinematic Series</h3>
          <p class="case-desc">Built a cinematic rain environment to dramatize the sneaker's durability — one extreme close-up with water droplets on hand and product, one low-angle street shot with reflective puddle. The brief: "make it look like Nike could have shot this."</p>
          <div class="case-tags">
            <span class="tag">Footwear</span><span class="tag">Cinematic</span><span class="tag">Durability Story</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="case-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="case-visual" style="height:380px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Wellness lifestyle walking" style="height:380px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Wellness smoothie pour" style="height:380px;">
          <div class="case-type-badge">Wellness · Lifestyle</div>
        </div>
        <div class="case-body">
          <div class="case-meta">
            <span class="case-client">Wellness &amp; Lifestyle Brand</span>
            <span class="case-year">2025</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="case-title">Active Lifestyle Campaign — Blender Brand Visual System</h3>
          <p class="case-desc">A wellness appliance brand needed content that connected product to lifestyle — not just hardware photography. I built a warm, golden-light morning routine world: active model, kitchen environment, and smoothie pour scenes designed for Instagram and TikTok thumbnail use.</p>
          <div class="case-tags">
            <span class="tag">Wellness</span><span class="tag">Lifestyle</span><span class="tag">Social Content</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CASE 4: BIRD BAG + PLANTAIN — side by side -->
    <div class="case-grid-2">
      <div class="case-card reveal">
        <div class="case-visual" style="height:380px; display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:2px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Bird bag lifestyle woman" style="height:380px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Bird bag beach scene" style="height:380px;">
          <div class="case-type-badge">Summer · Accessories</div>
        </div>
        <div class="case-body">
          <div class="case-meta">
            <span class="case-client">Summer Accessories Brand</span>
            <span class="case-year">2025</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="case-title">Summer Tote — Golden Hour Lifestyle Campaign</h3>
          <p class="case-desc">A summer bag brand needed seasonal visuals that felt aspirational — warm European streets, beach sand, golden hour light. I created a multi-scene campaign covering lifestyle carry and beach destination styling, anchored by the brand's signature orchid detail.</p>
          <div class="case-tags">
            <span class="tag">Accessories</span><span class="tag">Summer</span><span class="tag">Lifestyle</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="case-card reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="case-visual" style="height:380px;">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="case-img" alt="Plantain chips hero" style="height:380px; width:100%;">
          <div class="case-type-badge">Food · FMCG</div>
        </div>
        <div class="case-body">
          <div class="case-meta">
            <span class="case-client">Snack Food Brand — FMCG</span>
            <span class="case-year">2025</span>
          </div>
          <h3 class="case-title">Plantain Chips — Studio-Quality Hero Shot Campaign</h3>
          <p class="case-desc">Plantain chips are a commodity product — the only differentiator is how they're presented. I created a dramatic in-motion hero shot: chips cascading from bowl to bowl, backlit with warm kitchen light on marble. Designed to compete with premium snack brand photography at zero production cost.</p>
          <div class="case-tags">
            <span class="tag">Food</span><span class="tag">FMCG</span><span class="tag">Product Hero</span><span class="tag">Motion</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ PROCESS ═══ -->
<section id="process">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="process-header reveal">
      <div class="section-tag">How I Work</div>
      <h2 class="section-h2">The <em>Process</em></h2>
      <p>From first conversation to final asset delivery — a structured, strategic approach. No guesswork, no chaos.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="process-steps">
      <div class="process-step reveal">
        <div class="step-num">01</div>
        <div class="step-title">Discovery &amp; Diagnosis</div>
        <div class="step-body">I map your brand's visual gaps, identify positioning opportunities, and align on what success looks like before a single asset is created.</div>
        <div class="step-dot"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="process-step reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <div class="step-num">02</div>
        <div class="step-title">Creative Direction</div>
        <div class="step-body">I develop a full visual brief — mood, tone, aesthetic direction, color language, and production approach tailored to your brand.</div>
        <div class="step-dot"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="process-step reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="step-num">03</div>
        <div class="step-title">AI Production</div>
        <div class="step-body">I execute through high-realism AI production — iterating on prompts, compositions, and styling until the output is indistinguishable from premium studio work.</div>
        <div class="step-dot"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="process-step reveal reveal-delay-3">
        <div class="step-num">04</div>
        <div class="step-title">Delivery &amp; Strategy</div>
        <div class="step-body">Final assets delivered in all required formats with a usage guide and deployment recommendations to maximize visual impact across every channel.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ CREDIBILITY ═══ -->
<section id="credibility">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="cred-grid">
      <div class="cred-left reveal">
        <div class="section-tag">Social Proof</div>
        <h2 class="section-h2">What<br>Clients<br><em>Say</em></h2>
        <div style="margin-top:52px;">
          <div class="testimonial-block">
            <p class="test-text">"Divinefavour completely changed how we show up online. Our product imagery looks like a high-budget shoot — and we spent a fraction of what we would have with a studio."</p>
            <div class="test-name">Brand Founder</div>
            <div class="test-role">Fashion &amp; Accessories, Lagos</div>
          </div>
          <div class="testimonial-block">
            <p class="test-text">"What impressed me most was the strategic thinking behind every visual. This isn't someone who makes pretty pictures — this is someone who thinks like a brand director."</p>
            <div class="test-name">Marketing Lead</div>
            <div class="test-role">Wellness Brand, Remote</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cred-right reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="cred-stat-block">
          <div class="cred-stat-num">50<span>+</span></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cred-stat-title">Brand Projects Executed</div>
            <div class="cred-stat-desc">Across fashion, food, beauty, wellness, and accessories — delivering premium AI visual assets without traditional production overhead.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="cred-stat-block">
          <div class="cred-stat-num">0</div>
          <div>
            <div class="cred-stat-title">Physical Sets Required</div>
            <div class="cred-stat-desc">Every project produced entirely through AI — no logistics, no location fees, no delays waiting on studio availability.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="cred-stat-block">
          <div class="cred-stat-num">48<span>hr</span></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cred-stat-title">Average First Draft Delivery</div>
            <div class="cred-stat-desc">Where traditional studios take weeks, I deliver first-look assets within 48 hours of brief sign-off.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="platform-row">
          <div class="platform-badge">
            <span>📸</span>
            <span>Instagram<br>@divybydivinefavour</span>
          </div>
          <div class="platform-badge">
            <span>💼</span>
            <span>LinkedIn<br>Divinefavour U.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="platform-badge">
            <span>✉️</span>
            <span>Available<br>for Projects</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══ CTA ═══ -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="cta-inner">
    <div class="cta-bg-text">Collaborate</div>
    <div class="section-tag cta-tag">Let's Work Together</div>
    <h2 class="cta-h2">
      Ready to Build<br>Something<br><em>Premium?</em>
    </h2>
    <p class="cta-sub">
      If your brand deserves visuals that convert, I'm available for project-based collaborations and monthly retainers.
    </p>
    <div class="cta-actions">
      <a href="mailto:divinefavsom13@gmail.com" class="btn-primary">Send a Brief</a>
      <a href="mailto:divinefavsom13@gmail.com" class="cta-email">divinefavsom13@gmail.com</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">Divine<span>favour</span> Udechukwu</div>
  <ul class="footer-links">
    <li><a href="https://www.instagram.com/divybydivinefavour" target="_blank">Instagram</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/divinefavour-udechukwu-08711426a" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="footer-copy">&copy; 2025 Divinefavour Udechukwu</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // CURSOR
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  const ring = document.getElementById('cursorRing');
  let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
    mx=e.clientX; my=e.clientY;
    cursor.style.left=mx+'px'; cursor.style.top=my+'px';
  });
  (function animRing(){
    rx+=(mx-rx)*0.12; ry+=(my-ry)*0.12;
    ring.style.left=rx+'px'; ring.style.top=ry+'px';
    requestAnimationFrame(animRing);
  })();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.case-card,.service-card,.about-card,.process-step').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{
      ring.style.width='52px'; ring.style.height='52px';
      ring.style.borderColor='rgba(184,159,216,0.7)';
    });
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{
      ring.style.width='34px'; ring.style.height='34px';
      ring.style.borderColor='rgba(184,159,216,0.45)';
    });
  });

  // NAV SCROLL
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>nav.classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>60));

  // REVEAL
  const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
  },{threshold:0.1,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'}).observe === undefined
    ? revealEls.forEach(el=>el.classList.add('visible'))
    : (() => {
        const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
          entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
        },{threshold:0.1,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
        revealEls.forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
      })();
</script>
</body>
</html>
